text: A group of people standing and sitting around an elephant.
A large open room entering a kitchen and leading to an exit door.
A young man riding a skateboard down a road next to a sheep.
The double image shows a skateboarder jumping and grabbing his board.
two elephants standing side by side next to some bushes
People gather in front of a row of old building with a clock tower on the end of the row.
several red ripe apples in two large wooden boxes
A fire hose wound up and sitting in a bin against a wall.
A herd of cattle sitting next to each other on a pile of dry grass.
An alarm clock sitting next to a window on a black table.
